economic_notes: Wallace Hill Development Inc. accounted for using modified equity method. Investment in Tidal Bore Rafting Resort of $2,717,552 made during the year. Fisheries investments program active. Truckhouse program new in 2023.
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Total revenue of $65.8M includes deferred revenue opening/closing adjustments. Net debt position of -$4,201,894. Wallace Hill Development Inc. is a GBE accounted for under modified equity method. New investment in Tidal Bore Rafting Resort ($2,717,552) classified as capital activity. Covid-19 Emergency Funding expenses of $3,939,899 with no budgeted amount. Long-term debt of $47.2M is significant relative to financial assets. Audit report dated June 12, 2024 for March 31, 2023 fiscal year. Total government transfers estimated from ISC ($18,332,489) + Mi'kmaw Kina'matneway ($10,503,890) + Health Canada ($3,893,583) + other government departments receivable context; osr includes tobacco, fisheries, gas bar, gaming, and other own-source items.
